title: An Abelian (64681,441,3)-Difference Set
lean_gate_reason: Lean is a secondary formal seal here, not the gate to publication status. The repaired r=73 multiplier proof is already preserved well enough for a HUMAN_READY packet; Lean can proceed later as archival formalization once the theorem statement and citation are frozen.
micro_paper_assessment: Passes the micro-paper lane after audit. The repaired r=73 multiplier-orbit proof gives an exact residual-case nonexistence theorem, the bounded prior-art pass did not find rediscovery, and the remaining work is mostly manuscript compression rather than new mathematics.
strongest_honest_claim: No abelian group of order 64681 admits a (64681,441,3)-difference set; on the bounded 2026-04-15 publication audit this still appears to remove one of Gordon's six residual abelian lambda=3 cases rather than rediscover known work.
family_affinity: Strong affinity with squarefree-order residual abelian lambda=3 cases where a forced multiplier yields a small orbit-size spectrum.
generalization_signal: Moderate: the orbit-semigroup obstruction should transfer to nearby cyclic pq-order cases when a prime divisor of n has sparse orbit sizes.
candidate_theorem_slice: Exact audited slice: no abelian group of order 64681 admits a (64681,441,3)-difference set, via the valid first multiplier r=73 and the resulting 73-orbit semigroup obstruction on C_64681.
next_action: This packet is HUMAN_READY and has been moved to LEAN_QUEUE for formal sealing; do not block fresh curation/solve work on pending Lean.
